title: Threadline Build Week — personal project notes

messages.content: On Friday, July 17, 2026, I decided to enter OpenAI Build Week with Threadline, an idea to help me recover useful context from old AI conversations.
On Saturday, July 18, 2026, I build the Threadline MVP.
During that Saturday, Codex helped me build the first Threadline frontend with Vue and the backend with Fastify and TypeScript.
